SR 231 NEAR THE JUNCTION WITH US 395 SOUTH OF CHEWELAH IS DOWN TO 1 LANE ALTERNATING TRAFFIC. CREWS HAVE INSTALLED A TEMPORARY LIGHT TO ALLOW TRAFFIC TO PASS BOTH DIRECTIONS. DUE TO RECENT RUNOFF AND RAIN, THE HILL HOLDING THE ROADWAY UP HAS STARTED TO SLIDE.
